lenses.guidance: God speaks at Beersheba (v 3) — 'do not be afraid to go down to Egypt; I will make you into a great nation there' — the covenant promise extending into exile. The pattern Exodus and the prophets will exposit begins here.

The seventy who descend (v 27) anticipate the seventy elders at Sinai (Ex 24:1, 9), the seventy on whom the Spirit rests (Num 11:24-25), and the seventy Christ sends out (Lk 10:1) — a numerical thread across Scripture.
Israel 'offered sacrifices to the God of his father Isaac' before going down (v 1). Worship at the threshold of every major move; receive the promise on God's terms before boarding the cart.
